body: static protected void unpack(int[] out, int[] in, int bits) {
10-66:unpack.signature: unpack( int[] out,  int[] in,  int bits)
translation: def _unpack(out: object, in_: object, bits: object) -> None:
curInputValue = [in_[w + j] for j in range(bits)]
out[outOffset + k] = (curInputValue[k // 32] >> ((bits - 1 - k % bits) * bits)) & mask if k < 32 else curInputValue[k - 32] >> bits
